name: Finance Control Agent Tools
security: All /api/agent/* routes require Authorization: Bearer <AGENT_API_KEY>. Agent tools cannot mutate financial records.

tools.name: get_dashboard_summary
tools.description: Return the current financial dashboard summary.

tools.name: get_net_worth
tools.description: Return bank net worth, account balances and unpaid bill total.

tools.name: get_category_breakdown
tools.description: Return current month expenses grouped by category.

tools.name: get_monthly_cashflow
tools.description: Return monthly income, expenses and result.

tools.name: get_recurring_expenses
tools.description: Return recurring expenses detected by repeated description/category/amount.

tools.name: get_credit_card_summary
tools.description: Return card limits and unpaid/open bill totals.

tools.name: search_transactions
tools.description: Search transactions by query, period, category, provider or type.

tools.name: generate_financial_context
tools.description: Generate structured context for an external agent.
tools.safety_note: Read-only context generation with safety instructions.

tools.name: save_agent_analysis
tools.description: Save a textual analysis produced by an external agent.
tools.safety_note: Only writes to agent_analyses; cannot mutate financial records.
